scripts.dev: concurrently --names backend,portal,budget,compliance,kit-products,listini,panoramica,quotes,reports,rdf-backend,richieste-fattibilita,coperture,energia-dc --prefix-colors blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow,red,white,gray,blueBright,magentaBright,cyanBright,greenBright,yellowBright "cd backend && air" "pnpm --filter mrsmith-portal dev" "pnpm --filter mrsmith-budget dev" "pnpm --filter mrsmith-compliance dev" "pnpm --filter mrsmith-kit-products dev" "pnpm --filter mrsmith-listini-e-sconti dev" "pnpm --filter mrsmith-panoramica-cliente dev" "pnpm --filter mrsmith-quotes dev" "pnpm --filter mrsmith-reports dev" "pnpm --filter mrsmith-rdf-backend dev" "pnpm --filter mrsmith-richieste-fattibilita dev" "pnpm --filter mrsmith-coperture dev" "pnpm --filter mrsmith-energia-dc dev"
scripts.build: pnpm -r --if-present build && cd backend && go build -o bin/server ./cmd/server
scripts.test: cd backend && go test ./... && pnpm -r --if-present test
scripts.lint: cd backend && golangci-lint run && pnpm -r --if-present lint
